title: Ayanami Raising Project DS English Translation Finished
display_title: Ayanami Raising Project DS English Translation Finished
wikitext:
[]: Ayanami Raising Project (DS) English Translation Finished             Quote Post by xPearse » Sun May 11, 2014 3:19 pm Just though fans would want to know that im working on an English translation of the Ayanami Raising Project for the DS. I just started a few days ago so it's fairly recent, I hope you guys will become interested. For more information visit my romhacking page or my blog. http://pearsehillock.blogspot.co.uk/ http://www.romhacking.net/forum/index.php/topic,18102.0.html Here's also a short video of the translation. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EfYFrd8ua84 Edit At long last, a full release. It is done, I only have to spot check it but that'll take weeks for multiple playthroughs and I doubt people care so I'm gonna release it. You can get the download here, thanks for hanging on this long guys. http://pearsehillock.blogspot.co.uk/2014/10/neon-genesis-evangelion-ayanami-raising_15.html

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun May 11, 2014 3:35 pm inb4 mods quoting from the youtubes: it may not be the most accurate but I hope you guys won't be bothered by that.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Mon May 12, 2014 11:06 am Then why not help out and improve it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reiggae » Mon May 12, 2014 4:08 pm So many people have started this and quit, I'm glad someone finally picked it back up again. I'll play it even if it's not 100%.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon May 12, 2014 4:13 pm xPearse wrote: Then why not help out and improve it.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue May 13, 2014 4:15 pm Reiggae wrote: So many people have started this and quit, I'm glad someone finally picked it back up again. I'll play it even if it's not 100%.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sun May 25, 2014 3:30 pm I'm very supportive of this and would definitely play once it's out. Please keep up the good efforts! My Japanese sucks but is there any other help that you do need?

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Mon May 26, 2014 11:24 am Glad to see your interested, any Japanese is better than none. Thanks for the offer, your the first. If I run into anything im puzzled with I'll hit up up for a translation. I'll be making another progress update in a day or two, watch out for that. I wish I could update here when I please but sadly I can only reply and not bump thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Oct 18, 2014 11:16 pm You are heroes ~~

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Sun Oct 19, 2014 2:12 am This looks super interesting! I don't have a good way to play it yet, but thank you so much!

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Mon Oct 20, 2014 2:04 am Just got this and also downloaded a DS emulator to play it on. So far seems to play smoothly, just a little trouble with the audio. For the name I just wrote in hiragana and it went okay. It's a minor nuisance but okay. I'll keep at it and let you know what I think.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Mon Oct 20, 2014 7:06 am The audio doesn't work properly with desume due to its bad compatibility with certain games, no matter your settings. Use no$gba with zoomer plugin to rotate the video, the audio comes through perfectly that way. Thanks for your interest guys, I appreciate it.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Mon Oct 20, 2014 7:42 pm is there any interesting info about the evaverse or unsolved mysteries in this game?

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Oct 21, 2014 7:15 am K40s wrote: is there any interesting info about the evaverse or unsolved mysteries in this game?

[]:             Quote Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Sun Oct 26, 2014 6:41 pm Fascinating. Really want to play this just so I can get the dominatrix-Rei ending.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Sun Oct 26, 2014 7:59 pm Crazy Packers Fan wrote: Fascinating. Really want to play this just so I can get the dominatrix-Rei ending.

[]:             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Sun Oct 26, 2014 8:52 pm Wow, this must have been a lot of work. Thank you so much for doing this! I saw on your blog that there is a "Nerv Republic" ending where Kaworu is officially granted human rights? That is awesome! Any chance you'd be willing to send the text for that ending? Also, is there any other interesting Kaworu stuff in this game? Again, thanks for all your hard work!

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Oct 28, 2014 4:24 pm Literary Eagle wrote: Wow, this must have been a lot of work. Thank you so much for doing this! I saw on your blog that there is a "Nerv Republic" ending where Kaworu is officially granted human rights? That is awesome! Any chance you'd be willing to send the text for that ending? Also, is there any other interesting Kaworu stuff in this game? Again, thanks for all your hard work!

[]:             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Tue Oct 28, 2014 11:25 pm Oh my goodness, just this one ending was quite a lot of text, so I can only imagine how much the entire game must have been! Thank you very much for taking the time to do all of this, and for sharing the Nerv Republic text here. I never heard of this particular ending before, so it was really interesting. Thanks again!

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Wed Oct 29, 2014 7:02 am Your welcome, and yea, that ending was really long. Especially compared to a standard stat based ending which are roughly 30-50 screens of text each.
